code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut found = false
  mut max_val = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      if n > 0
        if not found
          max_val = n
          found = true
        else if n > max_val
          max_val = n
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    println("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
